{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Civil Engineer (Graduate Trainee)",
  "description": "At Ucalux, we take pride in tackling projects of all sizes and complexities, from intimate residential renovations to expansive commercial, industrial, and real estate developments. Every project is approached with the same dedication, to exceed your expectations and bring your vision to life.

At UCALUX, we distinguish ourselves in the construction industry through its unparalleled offerings, backed by over 50 years of combined international and local construction expertise. Our track record includes successfully delivering numerous iconic projects within the Lagos skyline and beyond. Our management team is strategically positioned to fulfill our clients&rsquo; requirements by leveraging an extensive network of specialists and suppliers across the entire construction sector.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer (Graduate Trainee)

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	As a Graduate Trainee Civil Engineer, you will support the senior engineering team in the daily execution and monitoring of construction activities.
	You will be responsible for assisting with site measurements, maintaining accurate project logs, and ensuring that works are carried out in alignment with approved drawings and safety protocols.
	This position offers intensive on-site exposure and the opportunity to develop core competencies in Nigerian construction standards and project management.


Key Responsibilities
Site Assistance &amp; Supervision:


	Support Site Engineers in supervising daily construction tasks to ensure they follow approved sequences.
	Assist in setting out works and verifying basic dimensions against latest approved construction drawings.
	Monitor labor productivity and help coordinate subcontractor activities on-site.


Quality &amp; Technical Support:


	Assist in conducting basic site inspections to identify visible non-conformities.
	Help collect material samples for testing (e.g., concrete cubes) and document test results.
	Ensure that only approved materials are being utilized for site works.


HSE Compliance:


	Assist in enforcing Health, Safety, and Environmental (HSE) protocols among site workers.
	Report any identified site risks or safety violations to the Site Engineer immediately.


Documentation &amp; Resource Tracking:


	Maintain the daily site diary, recording weather, labor headcount, and progress milestones.
	Track daily material deliveries and consumption to help prevent shortages.
	Help maintain an organized file of site instructions and approved drawing revisions.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Learning &amp; Adaptation: Successful completion of assigned technical training modules within the first 3 months.
	Documentation Accuracy: 100% accuracy in daily site logs and material tracking records.
	Safety Support: Zero safety incidents resulting from failure to report a known hazard.
	Technical Support: Providing 100% assistance in verifying dimensions for all assigned site sections.


Requirements


	Education: BSc or HND in Civil Engineering or Building Technology.
	Experience: 0&ndash;1 year of experience (National Youth Service Corps - NYSC members are encouraged to apply).
	Certifications: Relevant student or graduate memberships in professional bodies (e.g., NSE, COREN) are an advantage.
	Location: Ability to work on-site in Lagos.


Benefits


	HMO
	Pension
	Performance bonus
	Others.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume to:&nbsp;olabisi.akintola@ucaluxng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-11",
  "validThrough": "2026-03-19",

Civil Engineer (Graduate Trainee) Job at Ucalux




        
    

        
        At Ucalux, we take pride in tackling projects of all sizes and complexities, from intimate residential renovations to expansive commercial, industrial, and real estate developments. Every project is approached with the same dedication, to exceed your expectations and bring your vision to life.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



At UCALUX, we distinguish ourselves in the construction industry through its unparalleled offerings, backed by over 50 years of combined international and local construction expertise. Our track record includes successfully delivering numerous iconic projects within the Lagos skyline and beyond. Our management team is strategically positioned to fulfill our clients’ requirements by leveraging an extensive network of specialists and suppliers across the entire construction sector.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer (Graduate Trainee)

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	As a Graduate Trainee Civil Engineer, you will support the senior engineering team in the daily execution and monitoring of construction activities.
	You will be responsible for assisting with site measurements, maintaining accurate project logs, and ensuring that works are carried out in alignment with approved drawings and safety protocols.
	This position offers intensive on-site exposure and the opportunity to develop core competencies in Nigerian construction standards and project management.


Key Responsibilities
Site Assistance & Supervision:


	Support Site Engineers in supervising daily construction tasks to ensure they follow approved sequences.
	Assist in setting out works and verifying basic dimensions against latest approved construction drawings.
	Monitor labor productivity and help coordinate subcontractor activities on-site.


Quality & Technical Support:


	Assist in conducting basic site inspections to identify visible non-conformities.
	Help collect material samples for testing (e.g., concrete cubes) and document test results.
	Ensure that only approved materials are being utilized for site works.


HSE Compliance:


	Assist in enforcing Health, Safety, and Environmental (HSE) protocols among site workers.
	Report any identified site risks or safety violations to the Site Engineer immediately.


Documentation & Resource Tracking:


	Maintain the daily site diary, recording weather, labor headcount, and progress milestones.
	Track daily material deliveries and consumption to help prevent shortages.
	Help maintain an organized file of site instructions and approved drawing revisions.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Learning & Adaptation: Successful completion of assigned technical training modules within the first 3 months.
	Documentation Accuracy: 100% accuracy in daily site logs and material tracking records.
	Safety Support: Zero safety incidents resulting from failure to report a known hazard.
	Technical Support: Providing 100% assistance in verifying dimensions for all assigned site sections.


Requirements


	Education: BSc or HND in Civil Engineering or Building Technology.
	Experience: 0–1 year of experience (National Youth Service Corps - NYSC members are encouraged to apply).
	Certifications: Relevant student or graduate memberships in professional bodies (e.g., NSE, COREN) are an advantage.
	Location: Ability to work on-site in Lagos.


Benefits


	HMO
	Pension
	Performance bonus
	Others.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Lead Software Engineer (Fintech Platforms & Financial Systems)",
  "description": "Strivolabs is a technology and digital transformation company that designs and builds scalable digital platforms, automation systems, and AI-driven solutions for businesses across Africa and global markets. We work with organisations across financial services, fintech, lending, and core banking environments to design and implement modern digital infrastructure.

Our work includes building customer-facing platforms, financial APIs, embedded finance systems, digital lending solutions, and enterprise automation tools. As our client portfolio continues to grow, we are seeking a candidate&nbsp;to lead the delivery of complex digital products and financial technology platforms for our clients in the capacity below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Lead Software Engineer (Fintech Platforms &amp; Financial Systems)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;(Hybrid)

Role Overview


	The Lead Software Engineer will be responsible for leading the technical design, development and delivery of fintech and financial systems projects delivered by Strivo Labs.
	This role combines hands-on engineering, technical leadership and system architecture oversight, ensuring that platforms are built to high standards of security, scalability and reliability.


The Lead Engineer will work closely with:


	Technical Product Managers
	Software engineers and DevOps teams
	Client technical teams
	External integration partners


Key Responsibilities
Technical Architecture &amp; System Design:


	Design and oversee system architecture for fintech platforms and digital financial services systems
	Define best practices for backend development, APIs and platform infrastructure
	Ensure systems are built for scalability, resilience and high availability
	Guide architectural decisions around data models, system integrations and cloud infrastructure


Engineering Leadership:


	Lead and mentor software engineers across backend, frontend and platform development
	Establish engineering standards, coding practices and technical documentation
	Review code and ensure adherence to security and performance best practices
	Provide technical guidance to the development team during implementation


Platform Development:


	Lead the development of backend services, APIs and platform components
	Support the development of financial transaction systems, integration services and platform infrastructure
	Ensure secure handling of sensitive financial and customer data
	Support the implementation of authentication, encryption and security protocols


System Integrations:


	Design and oversee integrations with financial systems, payment infrastructure and third-party services
	Support integrations with banking systems, payment gateways and financial APIs
	Ensure reliable and secure communication between systems


DevOps &amp; Infrastructure Collaboration:


	Work closely with DevOps engineers to ensure robust infrastructure and deployment pipelines
	Support CI/CD pipeline implementation and system monitoring
	Ensure platform stability and operational readiness for production environments


Technical Delivery:


	Work with the Technical Product Manager to translate product requirements into technical implementation plans
	Estimate engineering timelines and guide development planning
	Identify technical risks and propose solutions
	Ensure projects are delivered on schedule and to a high technical standard


Types of Systems You Will Work On
The Lead Software Engineer will support the development of a variety of financial technology platforms, including:


	Digital lending systems
	Financial APIs and platform infrastructure
	Embedded finance platforms
	Merchant payment systems
	Customer onboarding and KYC systems
	Integration layers for core banking platforms
	Financial reporting and analytics systems.


Required Skills &amp; Experience
Engineering Experience:


	7+ years of experience in software engineering
	Proven experience designing and delivering scalable backend systems
	Experience building API-driven platforms and distributed systems
	Experience leading engineering teams or acting as a senior technical lead


Technical Skills:
Strong experience with:


	Backend development frameworks
	API architecture and integration design
	Relational databases and data modelling
	Cloud infrastructure environments
	Modern software development practices and version control
	Experience with fintech or financial systems development is strongly preferred.


Architecture &amp; System Design:


	Experience designing scalable system architectures
	Understanding of security best practices for financial platforms
	Experience implementing authentication, encryption and secure data handling


Leadership Skills:


	Ability to lead and mentor engineers
	Strong technical decision-making ability
	Excellent communication and documentation skills
	Ability to collaborate across product, engineering and client teams


Preferred Experience:
Candidates with experience working with or building systems related to:


	Fintech platforms
	Digital lending systems
	Payments infrastructure
	Financial APIs
	Core banking integrations will be highly valued.


What Success Looks Like in This Role
Within the first six months, the Lead Engineer will:


	Successfully lead the architecture and delivery of key fintech platform projects
	Establish strong engineering standards and development processes
	Support the development team in delivering scalable and secure systems
	Ensure robust technical execution across client engagements


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV,&nbsp;brief cover note outlining relevant engineering and fintech platform experience, links to GitHub, portfolio or previous technical projects (if available) to:&nbsp;hiring@strivolabs.com&nbsp;using &quot;Application &ndash; Lead Software Engineer&quot; as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-11",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-12",

  },

Lead Software Engineer (Fintech Platforms & Financial Systems) Job at Strivo Labs




        
    

        
        Strivolabs is a technology and digital transformation company that designs and builds scalable digital platforms, automation systems, and AI-driven solutions for businesses across Africa and global markets. We work with organisations across financial services, fintech, lending, and core banking environments to design and implement modern digital infrastructure.

Our work includes building customer-facing platforms, financial APIs, embedded finance systems, digital lending solutions, and enterprise automation tools. As our client portfolio continues to grow, we are seeking a candidate to lead the delivery of complex digital products and financial technology platforms for our clients in the capacity below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Lead Software Engineer (Fintech Platforms & Financial Systems)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Role Overview


	The Lead Software Engineer will be responsible for leading the technical design, development and delivery of fintech and financial systems projects delivered by Strivo Labs.
	This role combines hands-on engineering, technical leadership and system architecture oversight, ensuring that platforms are built to high standards of security, scalability and reliability.


The Lead Engineer will work closely with:


	Technical Product Managers
	Software engineers and DevOps teams
	Client technical teams
	External integration partners


Key Responsibilities
Technical Architecture & System Design:


	Design and oversee system architecture for fintech platforms and digital financial services systems
	Define best practices for backend development, APIs and platform infrastructure
	Ensure systems are built for scalability, resilience and high availability
	Guide architectural decisions around data models, system integrations and cloud infrastructure


Engineering Leadership:


	Lead and mentor software engineers across backend, frontend and platform development
	Establish engineering standards, coding practices and technical documentation
	Review code and ensure adherence to security and performance best practices
	Provide technical guidance to the development team during implementation


Platform Development:


	Lead the development of backend services, APIs and platform components
	Support the development of financial transaction systems, integration services and platform infrastructure
	Ensure secure handling of sensitive financial and customer data
	Support the implementation of authentication, encryption and security protocols


System Integrations:


	Design and oversee integrations with financial systems, payment infrastructure and third-party services
	Support integrations with banking systems, payment gateways and financial APIs
	Ensure reliable and secure communication between systems


DevOps & Infrastructure Collaboration:


	Work closely with DevOps engineers to ensure robust infrastructure and deployment pipelines
	Support CI/CD pipeline implementation and system monitoring
	Ensure platform stability and operational readiness for production environments


Technical Delivery:


	Work with the Technical Product Manager to translate product requirements into technical implementation plans
	Estimate engineering timelines and guide development planning
	Identify technical risks and propose solutions
	Ensure projects are delivered on schedule and to a high technical standard


Types of Systems You Will Work On
The Lead Software Engineer will support the development of a variety of financial technology platforms, including:


	Digital lending systems
	Financial APIs and platform infrastructure
	Embedded finance platforms
	Merchant payment systems
	Customer onboarding and KYC systems
	Integration layers for core banking platforms
	Financial reporting and analytics systems.


Required Skills & Experience
Engineering Experience:


	7+ years of experience in software engineering
	Proven experience designing and delivering scalable backend systems
	Experience building API-driven platforms and distributed systems
	Experience leading engineering teams or acting as a senior technical lead


Technical Skills:
Strong experience with:


	Backend development frameworks
	API architecture and integration design
	Relational databases and data modelling
	Cloud infrastructure environments
	Modern software development practices and version control
	Experience with fintech or financial systems development is strongly preferred.


Architecture & System Design:


	Experience designing scalable system architectures
	Understanding of security best practices for financial platforms
	Experience implementing authentication, encryption and secure data handling


Leadership Skills:


	Ability to lead and mentor engineers
	Strong technical decision-making ability
	Excellent communication and documentation skills
	Ability to collaborate across product, engineering and client teams


Preferred Experience:
Candidates with experience working with or building systems related to:


	Fintech platforms
	Digital lending systems
	Payments infrastructure
	Financial APIs
	Core banking integrations will be highly valued.


What Success Looks Like in This Role
Within the first six months, the Lead Engineer will:


	Successfully lead the architecture and delivery of key fintech platform projects
	Establish strong engineering standards and development processes
	Support the development team in delivering scalable and secure systems
	Ensure robust technical execution across client engagements


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, brief cover note outlining relevant engineering and fintech platform experience, links to GitHub, portfolio or previous technical projects (if available) to: [email protected] using "Application – Lead Software Engineer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "E-Commerce Assistant",
  "description": "Ascentech Services Limited is the most sought-after Human Resource Solution Provider with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We have a reputation for satisfying and surpassing clients expectations through our core offerings: Recruitment and Selection, Outsourcing, Training and Development. To accomplish these we leverage on creating and managing change in organizations by improving efficiency through our proven and dynamic HR solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: E-Commerce Assistant
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	We are looking for a&nbsp;reliable and detail-oriented E-Commerce Assistant&nbsp;to support daily online sales operations.
	The role involves managing product listings, assisting with order processing, handling stock arrangement, and preparing customer orders for delivery.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in managing orders from online shopping platforms.
	Update and maintain product and sales records using&nbsp;Microsoft Excel.
	Arrange and organize stock in the store.
	Pick, pack, and prepare customer orders for dispatch.
	Ensure accuracy in order processing and packaging.
	Follow instructions promptly and support daily e-commerce operations.


Requirements


	Proficiency in&nbsp;Microsoft Excel.
	Basic knowledge of&nbsp;online shopping platforms.
	Ability to handle&nbsp;stock arrangement and order packing.
	Attentive to details with a&nbsp;can-do attitude and willingness to learn.
	Ability to&nbsp;follow instructions and respond promptly.


Salary
N90,000 &ndash; N100,000 / month

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruiter3@ascentech.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

E-Commerce Assistant Job at Ascentech Services Limited




        
    

        
        Ascentech Services Limited is the most sought-after Human Resource Solution Provider with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We have a reputation for satisfying and surpassing clients expectations through our core offerings: Recruitment and Selection, Outsourcing, Training and Development. To accomplish these we leverage on creating and managing change in organizations by improving efficiency through our proven and dynamic HR solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: E-Commerce Assistant
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented E-Commerce Assistant to support daily online sales operations.
	The role involves managing product listings, assisting with order processing, handling stock arrangement, and preparing customer orders for delivery.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in managing orders from online shopping platforms.
	Update and maintain product and sales records using Microsoft Excel.
	Arrange and organize stock in the store.
	Pick, pack, and prepare customer orders for dispatch.
	Ensure accuracy in order processing and packaging.
	Follow instructions promptly and support daily e-commerce operations.


Requirements


	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel.
	Basic knowledge of online shopping platforms.
	Ability to handle stock arrangement and order packing.
	Attentive to details with a can-do attitude and willingness to learn.
	Ability to follow instructions and respond promptly.


Salary
N90,000 – N100,000 / month

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Finance Officer",
  "description": "Trinity Financials is a Financial Institution govervned and regulated by&nbsp;CBN.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagoss
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a meticulous and proactive finance officer keen on detail, witha passion for financial integrity and the ability to turn complex numbers into clear insights,to join our growing team.
	In this role, you will be required to processdaily financial operations, ensuring everything from payroll to tax compliance runs like a well-oiled machine.


Key Responsibilities


	Financial Reporting: Assist in the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.
	Accounts Management: Oversee Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable, ensuring timely payments and collections.
	Budgeting: Track budget expenses and provide regular reports on variances.
	Compliance: Ensure all financial transactions comply with local regulations and internal policies.
	Audit Support: Prepare documentation and provide support for internal and external audits.
	Payroll: Manage payroll processing and tax withholdings.


Qualifications &amp; Skills


	Education: Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in finance, accounting, or a related field.
	Experience: 2 - 5 years of experience in a finance or accounting role.
	Must have a second-class upper from a recognised university
	Maximum age limit: 28
	Must be working with a bank or financial institution.
	Experience in the use of BankOne
	Technical Proficiency: Strong command of Excel and experience with accounting software
	Attention to Detail: An eagle eye for spotting discrepancies.
	Communication: Ability to explain financial data to non-finance colleagues clearly.


Benefit


	Competitive salary.
	Leave Allowance
	HMO &amp; Pension
	A collaborative work environment where your input is valued.
	Opportunities for professional growth and certification support.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;trinityfinancialng01@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;Only qualified candidates will be contacted.",

Finance Officer Job at Trinity Financials




        
    

        
        Trinity Financials is a Financial Institution govervned and regulated by CBN.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagoss
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a meticulous and proactive finance officer keen on detail, witha passion for financial integrity and the ability to turn complex numbers into clear insights,to join our growing team.
	In this role, you will be required to processdaily financial operations, ensuring everything from payroll to tax compliance runs like a well-oiled machine.


Key Responsibilities


	Financial Reporting: Assist in the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.
	Accounts Management: Oversee Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable, ensuring timely payments and collections.
	Budgeting: Track budget expenses and provide regular reports on variances.
	Compliance: Ensure all financial transactions comply with local regulations and internal policies.
	Audit Support: Prepare documentation and provide support for internal and external audits.
	Payroll: Manage payroll processing and tax withholdings.


Qualifications & Skills


	Education: Bachelor’s degree in finance, accounting, or a related field.
	Experience: 2 - 5 years of experience in a finance or accounting role.
	Must have a second-class upper from a recognised university
	Maximum age limit: 28
	Must be working with a bank or financial institution.
	Experience in the use of BankOne
	Technical Proficiency: Strong command of Excel and experience with accounting software
	Attention to Detail: An eagle eye for spotting discrepancies.
	Communication: Ability to explain financial data to non-finance colleagues clearly.


Benefit


	Competitive salary.
	Leave Allowance
	HMO & Pension
	A collaborative work environment where your input is valued.
	Opportunities for professional growth and certification support.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only qualified candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer",
  "description": "ETC Workforce Services Limited is a leading Workforce Management, HR Consulting and Recruitment Organization; Empowering businesses to focus on their core competencies while we handle the complexities of HR, staffing, and operational support. With a client-centric approach, cutting-edge solutions, and a team of dedicated experts, we streamline processes and drive growth, allowing our partners to thrive in today&rsquo;s competitive landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	This role is responsible for managing purchasing activities and establishing supplier contracts.
	It involves sourcing high-quality, cost-effective supplies, ensuring compliance with procurement policies, and maintaining accurate inventory records.
	The ideal candidate will be detail-oriented, thorough, and possess a strong knowledge of supply chain
	management processes, contributing to efficient production operations and costoptimization.


Key Duties and Responsibilities


	Act as the primary liaison between internal departments and customers, coordinating procurement, delivery, and disbursement procedures for materials and raw stock.
	Ensure the timely availability of materials by continuously monitoring inventory levels and implementing effective stock management practices.
	Collaborate with existing suppliers and evaluate potential new suppliers to secure the best value, quality, and delivery timelines, while nurturing strong supplier relationships.
	Create and maintain a comprehensive supplier database, including a preferred supplier list and contractor details with key contractual information.
	Perform additional tasks assigned by the Production &amp; Supply Chain Manager to achieve departmental goals.
	Optimize storage efficiency by ensuring materials are stored for easy identification and accessibility.
	Develop and execute purchasing strategies that align with organizational objectives and enhance operational efficiency.
	Maintain accurate and up-to-date procurement records and reports, leveraging tools for tracking activities and expenditures.
	Oversee project-specific procurements, ensuring compliance with budgets and cost


Competencies and Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree / HND in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in procurement or supply chain operations
	Certifications in any of the following will be an advantage: The Chartered Institute of&nbsp;
	Procurement &amp; Supply (CIPS), Nigerian Institute of Purchasing and Supply (NIPS),
	Chartered Institute of Supply Chain Management (CISCM), Six Sigma, or other relevant procurement and supply chain certifications.
	Solid knowledge and understanding of procurement processes, policy, and market&nbsp; trends. Capability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time efficiently.
	Analytical and problem-solving capabilities for managing complexities and risks
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and procurement software applications for reporting.
	Strong negotiation skills to negotiate best buy purchases.

Procurement Officer Job at ETC Workforce Services Limited




        
    

        
        ETC Workforce Services Limited is a leading Workforce Management, HR Consulting and Recruitment Organization; Empowering businesses to focus on their core competencies while we handle the complexities of HR, staffing, and operational support. With a client-centric approach, cutting-edge solutions, and a team of dedicated experts, we streamline processes and drive growth, allowing our partners to thrive in today’s competitive landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	This role is responsible for managing purchasing activities and establishing supplier contracts.
	It involves sourcing high-quality, cost-effective supplies, ensuring compliance with procurement policies, and maintaining accurate inventory records.
	The ideal candidate will be detail-oriented, thorough, and possess a strong knowledge of supply chain
	management processes, contributing to efficient production operations and costoptimization.


Key Duties and Responsibilities


	Act as the primary liaison between internal departments and customers, coordinating procurement, delivery, and disbursement procedures for materials and raw stock.
	Ensure the timely availability of materials by continuously monitoring inventory levels and implementing effective stock management practices.
	Collaborate with existing suppliers and evaluate potential new suppliers to secure the best value, quality, and delivery timelines, while nurturing strong supplier relationships.
	Create and maintain a comprehensive supplier database, including a preferred supplier list and contractor details with key contractual information.
	Perform additional tasks assigned by the Production & Supply Chain Manager to achieve departmental goals.
	Optimize storage efficiency by ensuring materials are stored for easy identification and accessibility.
	Develop and execute purchasing strategies that align with organizational objectives and enhance operational efficiency.
	Maintain accurate and up-to-date procurement records and reports, leveraging tools for tracking activities and expenditures.
	Oversee project-specific procurements, ensuring compliance with budgets and cost


Competencies and Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree / HND in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in procurement or supply chain operations
	Certifications in any of the following will be an advantage: The Chartered Institute of 
	Procurement & Supply (CIPS), Nigerian Institute of Purchasing and Supply (NIPS),
	Chartered Institute of Supply Chain Management (CISCM), Six Sigma, or other relevant procurement and supply chain certifications.
	Solid knowledge and understanding of procurement processes, policy, and market  trends. Capability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time efficiently.
	Analytical and problem-solving capabilities for managing complexities and risks
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and procurement software applications for reporting.
	Strong negotiation skills to negotiate best buy purchases.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
